title: Wiu of calendar - (at least) 12 month ahed in one glimt

posts.author: Gitte (Gitte B. Svensen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im totaly new to monday, sorry english is not my motherthung… i need to see 12 month in calendar wiu. So that I can see in one glimt how much aktivitys there is for 12 month ahed whitch month has more capasity and whitch one is “overdone”… maybee somthing like this…
its probebly bacik information - thank you for your time

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Gitte, I think the best way to do this in monday.com is to use a Gantt chart. You can set it up to see a whole year at a time:

image1535×632 69.3 KB

Let me know if this helps!
